mechanics.excerpt: Intelligence indicates that Khan Vlad will stop at nothing destroy Khan Phelan, leader ot tne Wolves exile THE UNIVERSE TURNED UPSIDE DOWN The first five years after Tukayyid; tumultuous though they were seemed positively tranquil compared with the explosive events of 3058-3061- Those years saw many of the certainties accepted by both the Clans and the Inner Sphere violently over: turned_ giving way t0 new order fraught with possibilities ad perils In the wake of House Liao invasion of the Sarna March_ the Word of Blake seized its chance ad captured Terra_ cradle of humanity and ComStar' $ stronghold_ Troop movements from the Free Worlds League into the so called Chaos March provid- ed cover for the Word of Blake Militia to movt several divisions within striking distance of Terra, just as the high demand for mercenary trOOpS in the March decimated ComStar'$ forces Brion's Legion _ mercenary unit that had constituted nearly half the strength of ComStar'$ Terran Defense Force since the Fourth Succession War; abruptly canceled its contract in favor higher-paying Chaos March assignment: Unwilling to relo cate Com Guard forces from the Clan border; ComStar'$ Precentor Martial replaced Brion'$ Legion with aother merce- nary unit the Twenty-First Centauri Lancers_ The Lancers how- ever, never arrived on Terra Instead the Word of Blake sent its own troops, which masqueraded as the Lancers for long enougn Move the rest their forces into position In Iate February 3058 the Word of Blake struck; The Com Guards on Terra; taken by surprise and unable to use the plan e75 formidable defenses because of Blakist sabotage from the inside, fought bloody but ultimately futile battle across every continent: By early March the Word of Blake held Terra in an iron grip that has yet to be dislodged_ Precentor Martial Focht of ComStar declined to attempt the reconquest of Terra as long as the Clans remained greater threat to the Inner Sphere During those same months; Clan Jade Falcon drove deep into the Lyran Alliance and captured severa planets, until Inner Sphere forces halted them on the world of Coventry: Conceived show of strength in the aftermath of the Refusal War; the Coventry campaign was have more ominous conse quences for the Clans than the Falcons could have anticipated On Coventry; the Falcons met coalition force from across the Inner Sphere_ led Prince Victor Steiner Davion the Federated Commonwealth: The Inner Sphere and Jade Falcon armies were eveniy matched; neither side could win Coventry without protracted and bloody battle_ and both commanders realized At the same time_ Khan Vlad of Clan Wolf was threat: ening the Falcons with strikes at worlds in the Jade Falcon occu: pation zone: Prince Victor invoked the Clan rite of safcon to ensure safe landing for his troops ad then offered Falcon Khan Marthe Pryde the only honorable way out-_hegira, the tra ditional right of deteated enemy to eave the field with forces 184
